organization: AOF Next Major Version Planning Organization
request: AOFを次のメジャーバージョンへ進化させる
need: Demonstrate that AOF 2.1 can plan the next major version using its own organization model and artifacts.
intent: Approve the next major direction and bind requirements, organization, contracts, roadmap, and release plan into an auditable planning package.
context: v2.0 established installer, bootstrap, and upgrade paths. v2.1 established .aof/organization.json and Role-Agent separation. The next major version needs a plan that advances AOF as an organization operating system without claiming unimplemented runtime autonomy.
options_considered: Treat the next major version as an implementation release immediately.
Use AOF 2.1 first to create an auditable planning package before implementation.
Defer major-version planning until runtime features are added.
selected_option: Use AOF 2.1 first to create an auditable planning package before implementation.
decision_summary: Use AOF 2.1 itself to plan the next major version through requirements analysis, organization formation, team charters, contracts, council approval, roadmap, and release plan.
governance_model: Product Council, Architecture Council, and Operations Council approve under the default 2_of_3 council policy.
why_this_option: It satisfies the benchmark mission using only AOF 2.1 artifacts and keeps runtime execution claims separate from planning governance.
why_other_options_were_not_selected: Immediate implementation would skip contract and governance validation. Deferral would fail to prove that AOF 2.1 can organize and plan its own next major version.
policy_priorities_applied: Artifact traceability, Role-Agent separation, council-governed approval, and explicit release gates.
actions: Use the planning package as the starting point for the next major version.
Treat implementation, runtime enforcement, and backend integration as later scoped phases.
Keep council approval as a decision artifact rather than a dependency node.
expected_artifact: Approved planning package for the next major version.
expected_outcome: AOF has a traceable roadmap and release plan for evolving organization operation.
completion_criteria: All mission success criteria artifacts exist and schema-backed artifacts validate against their existing schemas.
success_criteria: Requirements analysis, organization formation, team charters, contracts, ADR, council approval, roadmap, and release plan are present.
